testcase.name: test_generate_questions_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"503 UNAVAILABLE. {'error': {'code': 503, 'message': 'This model is currently experiencing high demand. Spikes in demand are usually temporary. Please try again later.', 'status': 'UNAVAILAB assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_endpoints.py:21: in test_generate_questions_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"503 UNAVAILABLE. {'error': {'code': 503, 'message': 'This model is currently experiencing high demand. Spikes in demand are usually temporary. Please try again later.', 'status': 'UNAVAILAB E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
